title: Canadian Fish Fry
description: A simple and delicious fish fry with a Canadian twist. Serve hot with your favorite sides.

ingredients.name: Canadian fish (such as cod or haddock)

instructions: Preheat oil in a large skillet to 350°F (175°C).
Dredge fish fillets in cornstarch, shaking off excess.
Add fish to hot oil and cook for 3-4 minutes per side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
Remove fish from oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Sprinkle blackening seasoning over fish and serve hot.
